message:
chore: Add gitignore patterns for ephemeral artifacts

Ignore common development artifacts that shouldn't be tracked:

- __pycache__/ and *.pyc: Python bytecode caches
- perf/: Performance optimization test artifacts
- scripts/e2e/sources_sync.sh: Incomplete stub script

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -58,3 +58,13 @@ tests/e2e-report/
 tests/e2e-results.json
 tests/e2e/.env.test
 tests/test-results/
+
+# Python bytecode caches (global)
+__pycache__/
+*.pyc
+
+# Performance optimization artifacts
+perf/
+
+# Incomplete/stub scripts
+scripts/e2e/sources_sync.sh
